author: doll-agent
content: Implemented in ferray-ufunc/src/ops/complex.rs. 20 new ufunc entries: trig (sin/cos/tan/asin/acos/atan), hyperbolic (sinh/cosh/tanh/asinh/acosh/atanh), exp/ln/log2/log10/sqrt/expm1/log1p/power. expm1 and log1p use cancellation-avoiding paths via exp_m1/ln_1p and the cos(x)-1 = -2 sin^2(x/2) identity for precision near z=0. 14 new tests pass; full ferray-ufunc 513 tests + ferray-linalg 244 unit + 21 oracle + 12 property pass; clippy -D warnings clean; statistical_equivalence.py 47/47 PASS.
